title: Outcome dashboard (adoptions + reuse + key-defect rate)
context: As the number of adopted banks grows, the project needs a machine-readable way to track its success metrics: adoptions, verifiable reuse events, auto-grade self-test pass rate, and key-defect rate. The dashboard reads the outcome ledger (outcomes/<bank-id>.json files) and generates a summary report. No learner data is collected; all metrics are derived from the Steward-recorded adoption artifacts.
objective: Implement an outcome dashboard that reads the project's adoption evidence artifacts and generates a summary of the key success metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads outcomes/<bank-id>.json adoption artifacts and generates a summary report: number of banks adopted, verifiable reuse events, coverage percentages, and any key-defect reports.
Auto-grade self-test pass rate computed from CI records.
Output is a machine-readable JSON summary and a human-readable Markdown report.
No learner/student data is read or reported; all metrics are from Steward-recorded artifacts.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commits DCO signed-off.
output: A CI-integrated outcome dashboard CLI (MIT-licensed Node package) generating JSON + Markdown success-metric summaries from the project's adoption artifacts.
